TextENGNew: ``-- Oh, the car carrying suspect Shigeru Ounuma has just emerged from the underground parking garage of the Ministry of Health and Welfare!``
...The instant the on-site reporter said that, cameras lying in wait along the car's path fired their flashes in unison, capturing the interior of the vehicle.
The Deputy Director of the Ministry of Health and Welfare's Pharmaceutical Affairs Bureau... Shigeru Ounuma sat in the center of the back seat, flanked by detectives on both sides.
``Right now, the press corps that was waiting here is aiming all their cameras at the back seat simultaneously.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2003. The sheer number is staggering...!``
``If I'm not careful, I might be swept away myself by this surging tide of people.``
...And a short distance from the press corps, a group could be seen hoisting banners and placards.
changeReason: Old translation says 'beyond the car' but the Japanese refers to distance from the press corps (その一段), which the new translation correctly captures.

TextENGNew: Scrawled across them in rough lettering were various epithets -- 'Murderer,' 'Corrupt Bureaucrat' -- and the crowd hurled shouts of fury at the car as it crept slowly past.
changeReason: Old translation incorrectly has the mob moving slowly toward the car; the Japanese describes the car moving slowly (ゆっくりと進む車) while the crowd shouts at it.

TextENGNew: ``Murderer!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_yajiA2002. Give me back my child!!``
changeReason: Old translation specifies 'daughter' but the Japanese うちの子 is gender-neutral ('my child'); new translation preserves this ambiguity.

TextENGNew: ``You're not human -- you're a demon!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_yajiB2002. How can you sit there with a straight face after trampling on the lives of all those patients?!``
``Was money really that important to you?!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_yajiC2002. You were already being paid with our tax money! Have you no shame!!``

``...The group gathered over there consists of members of the victims' association.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2006. Family members of patients, acquaintances, and hospital staff... the crowd appears to be of considerable size.``
changeReason: Old translation renders 被害者の会 as 'aggrieved parties' rather than 'victims' association,' missing that it refers to a specific organized group.

TextENGNew: ``They are all directing a torrent of abuse at the car carrying suspect Ounuma.@k@|@y@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2008. ...Oh, someone just threw a stone!``
``Damn you... damn you!!@k@|@y@vS20/00/VTK2_yajiA2004. Because of you, my daughter... my daughter...!!!``
``The man who threw the stone has been restrained by officers on the scene.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2010. But his rage is something all of us can understand.``
``After all, the number of patients whose conditions worsened due to the side effects of Placil currently stands at over five hundred confirmed cases alone...``
changeReason: Old translation adds 'still rising' which isn't in the Japanese; new translation more accurately conveys 現状確認できるだけでも as 'confirmed cases alone.'

TextENGNew: ``In the field of psychiatric treatment, where the patient base is comparatively small, experts have noted that this figure is abnormally high.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2013. Furthermore, several cases have now been confirmed in which patients died as a result.``
``...Yoshimura-san at the scene.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_Tvann2002. Can you tell us what the suspect Ounuma looked like as he was being transported?``
``Yes... the car's interior was quite dark, and moreover, suspect Ounuma had his jacket pulled completely over his head, so his expression could not be seen.``
``However, according to those close to him, even before the police arrived at his workplace, he had a composed demeanor -- as though he had already made his peace with what was coming.``
changeReason: Old says 'arrived on the scene' but the Japanese specifies 職場 (workplace); new correctly translates this as 'arrived at his workplace.'

TextENGNew: ``In a previous interview, I believe the suspect asserted his innocence, didn't he?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_Tvann2004. Has there been any change in that regard?``

``Unfortunately, that point remains unclear at this time, so we will look to report further as we conduct additional interviews with those involved.@k@vS20/00/VTK2_repo2017. That's all from the scene.``
``This is all lies!!``
